title: Xtra Fluffy Slovakian Potato Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring light and airy potato dumplings, perfect for a brunch mood, made with bicarbonate of soda for an extra fluffy texture and shaped like nigiri for a fun twist, high in protein to keep you full

ingredients.name: potatoes
ingredients.notes: high starch potatoes like russet work best

ingredients.name: grated cheese
ingredients.notes: like cheddar or feta for extra flavor

instructions: Boil the potatoes until they are tender, then drain and let cool.
Mash the cooled potatoes in a large bowl with a fork until they are mostly smooth.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, bicarbonate of soda, and salt.
Add the flour mixture to the mashed potatoes and stir until just combined.
Beat in the egg until the mixture is smooth and sticky.
Knead the mixture on a floured surface for about 5 minutes until it comes together in a ball.
Divide the dough into small pieces and shape each one into a small ball, then flatten slightly into a disk shape, like nigiri.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and gently add the dumplings, cooking for about 10 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and top each one with a pat of melted butter, some grated cheese, and a sprinkle of chopped parsley.
